name: stockiq-android
description: StockIQ - AI-Powered Stock & Mutual Fund Analyzer

scripts.android:build: npm run build && npx cap sync && npx cap open android
scripts.android:apk: npm run build && npx cap sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
scripts.android:debug: npm run build && npx cap sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
